Mtn To Quash Or Limit Depo Subpoena
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SHANNON MASELLI's motion To Quash Or Limit Deposition Subpoena will be heard at 9:00 am in department 301 on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Plaintiff Shannon Maselli Motion To Quash Or Limit Deposition Subpoena
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mitch Onu, Esq. of the Law Offices of Mitch Onu, Tel. 650.299.9028, for plaintiff and moving party via court call;
David N. Poll, Esq. of Glaspy & Glaspy, Inc., Tel. 408.279.8844, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: After hearing, Plaintiff Shannon Maselli's Motion To Quash Or Limit Deposition Subpoena is Denied. Parties to meet and confer going forward on subpoenas. Defendant's Counsel to submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
